# openai_group (Data Source)

Look up an organization group by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "openai_group" "example" {
  group_id = "group_123"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `group_id` (String) group id

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (Number) created at
- `group_type` (String) group type
- `id` (String) id
- `is_scim_managed` (Boolean) is scim managed
- `name` (String) name
- `response_json` (String) Raw JSON response returned by the OpenAI API.
